My Speeches and Contributions in Parliament

  • Tweet

What's happening in the House?

If you want to know what's happening in Parliament please follow this link: http://services.parliament.uk/calendar/

Martin's appearances

Here you can read Martin's appearances and speeches in Parliament (data provided by theyworkforyou):

Business of the House | Commons debates

Yesterday I held a meeting with representatives from Hydrogen UK, a number of whose members have projects planned for my constituency.

UK Steel Strategy | Commons debates

Hundreds of my constituents work at the Scunthorpe steelworks, and hundreds more are reliant on the supply chain.
